meta.name: Sway Station
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: A tidy Sway workstation with waybar, foot, notifications and idle-lock — the full setup declared as `files`, no shell hooks. Built for real work on modest hardware.

files.content:
# Managed by Manifest OS — Sway
set $mod Mod4
set $term foot
set $menu wmenu-run

output * bg #1e1e2e solid_color

# Autostart (waybar is launched by the bar block below - do not exec it too)
exec mako
exec manifest-wallpaper
exec nm-applet --indicator
exec swayidle -w timeout 300 'swaylock -f' timeout 600 'swaymsg "output * dpms off"' resume 'swaymsg "output * dpms on"'

input "type:touchpad" {
    tap enabled
    natural_scroll enabled
}

# Look & feel
gaps inner 8
gaps outer 4
default_border pixel 2
client.focused #cba6f7 #cba6f7 #1e1e2e #89b4fa #cba6f7
font pango:JetBrainsMono Nerd Font 10

# Apps
bindsym $mod+Return exec $term
bindsym $mod+d exec $menu
bindsym $mod+b exec firefox
bindsym $mod+q kill
bindsym $mod+Shift+e exit
bindsym $mod+f fullscreen
bindsym $mod+space floating toggle
bindsym $mod+l exec swaylock -f

# Focus
bindsym $mod+Left focus left
bindsym $mod+Right focus right
bindsym $mod+Up focus up
bindsym $mod+Down focus down

# Move
bindsym $mod+Shift+Left move left
bindsym $mod+Shift+Right move right
bindsym $mod+Shift+Up move up
bindsym $mod+Shift+Down move down

# Workspaces
bindsym $mod+1 workspace number 1
bindsym $mod+2 workspace number 2
bindsym $mod+3 workspace number 3
bindsym $mod+4 workspace number 4
bindsym $mod+Shift+1 move container to workspace number 1
bindsym $mod+Shift+2 move container to workspace number 2
bindsym $mod+Shift+3 move container to workspace number 3
bindsym $mod+Shift+4 move container to workspace number 4

# Screenshots + media keys
bindsym Print exec grim -g "$(slurp)" ~/Pictures/screenshot-$(date +%s).png
bindsym XF86AudioRaiseVolume exec wpctl set-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ 5%+
bindsym XF86AudioLowerVolume exec wpctl set-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ 5%-
bindsym XF86AudioMute exec wpctl set-mute @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ toggle
bindsym XF86MonBrightnessUp exec brightnessctl set +5%
bindsym XF86MonBrightnessDown exec brightnessctl set 5%-

bar {
    swaybar_command waybar
}

# Managed by Manifest OS — mako
font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font 10
background-color=#1e1e2e
text-color=#cdd6f4
border-color=#cba6f7
border-size=2
border-radius=10
padding=12
default-timeout=6000
max-visible=5

[urgency=critical]
border-color=#f38ba8
default-timeout=0

# Managed by Manifest OS — foot
font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font:size=11
pad=12x12

[colors-dark]
alpha=0.95
background=1e1e2e
foreground=cdd6f4

# Managed by Manifest OS
add_newline = true
command_timeout = 1000

[character]
success_symbol = "[❯](bold green)"
error_symbol = "[❯](bold red)"

[directory]
truncation_length = 3
style = "bold cyan"

[git_branch]
symbol = " "
style = "bold purple"

[git_status]
style = "bold yellow"

[cmd_duration]
min_time = 2000
format = "took [$duration](bold yellow) "

# Managed by Manifest OS
setopt AUTO_CD INTERACTIVE_COMMENTS
HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history
HISTSIZE=10000
SAVEHIST=10000
setopt SHARE_HISTORY HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS

# Sensible aliases (eza/bat are installed in packages)
alias ls='eza --group-directories-first --icons'
alias ll='eza -lah --group-directories-first --icons'
alias tree='eza --tree'
alias cat='bat --paging=never'
alias grep='grep --color=auto'
alias ..='cd ..'
alias ...='cd ../..'

autoload -Uz compinit && compinit
zstyle ':completion:*' menu select

# Prompt (starship is installed in packages)
eval "$(starship init zsh)"
